pillars.title: Rooted in scripture
pillars.body: The Bible is our ground. Every sermon, every song, every decision tested against the whole counsel of God.

pillars.title: Raised to lead
pillars.body: Everyone carries something. We train and send — first-time servers, future campus pastors, parents, kids, all of it.

pillars.title: Released to the world
pillars.body: Futures is not a fortress. We plant, serve, give, and go — across twenty-one campuses and the cities that surround them.

beliefs.title: On God
beliefs.body: One God, eternally Father, Son, and Holy Spirit. Holy, loving, just, and personally known.

beliefs.title: On scripture
beliefs.body: The Bible is the inspired, authoritative word of God — sufficient for faith, life, and practice.

beliefs.title: On Jesus
beliefs.body: Fully God and fully man. Born of a virgin, lived without sin, died for our sins, rose bodily, reigns now, and is returning.

beliefs.title: On the Spirit
beliefs.body: God with us and in us — convicting, empowering, gifting, and transforming the church to look like Jesus.

beliefs.title: On the Church
beliefs.body: The people of God across every nation — gathered locally, sent globally, responsible for one another and for the world.

worshipCards.title: Music
worshipCards.body: Live, contemporary, sung together. Hymns we love, songs we’re writing, silence when we need it.

worshipCards.title: Message
worshipCards.body: Scripture-anchored teaching. Usually 35 minutes. Always aimed at a real, changed Monday.

worshipCards.title: Communion
worshipCards.body: Weekly at most campuses. A short table, real bread, real cup, real grace. You don’t have to be perfect to come.

worshipCards.title: Baptism
worshipCards.body: Public, by immersion, celebrated loudly. If you’re asking about baptism, ask your campus pastor this Sunday.

seniorPastors.name: Ashley Evans
seniorPastors.oneLine: Fourth-generation Adelaide pastor. Leads Futures across twenty-one campuses.
seniorPastors.quote: I didn’t build this. I’m a caretaker of something my great-grandfather started in 1922.

seniorPastors.name: Jane Evans
seniorPastors.oneLine: Pastor, author, founder of bU Women. Mentoring leaders across four countries.
seniorPastors.quote: There’s a version of you God is raising up. bU is the room where she gets named.
